kharif.logic: Monsoon crops that tolerate warm weather and rainfall.
kharif.advice: Plan drainage, avoid fertilizer before heavy rain, and monitor fungal diseases and sucking pests.

rabi.logic: Winter crops that prefer cooler temperatures and controlled irrigation.
rabi.advice: Protect crop from cold stress, irrigate at critical stages, and monitor rust and aphids.

summer.logic: Short duration or irrigated crops that can handle heat when water is available.
summer.advice: Use mulching, irrigate early morning or evening, and protect crops from heat stress.
